message:
feat(pager,btree,e2e): add page cache prefetch infrastructure with CPU intrinsics and B-tree cursor append optimization

Introduces prefetch hints from the B-tree cursor through the pager to
the page cache, using x86_64 prefetch intrinsics to warm L1 cache
lines for upcoming page lookups, reducing cache miss latency on
sequential scan and append workloads.

Pager layer:
- Enable #![feature(core_intrinsics)] for prefetch_read_data
- Add prefetch_page_hint() to FastPageArray, FlatPageSlots, and
  ShardedPageCache using prefetch_read_data::<T, 3> intrinsics
- Add flush-busy handoff retry loop (bounded spin + yield) to pager
  transaction commit path
- Add TransactionHandle trait methods: prefetch_page_hint(),
  try_take_staged_page_data(), try_mutate_staged_page_data(),
  restore_staged_page_data() for zero-copy B-tree append hot paths
- Add TransactionKind enum dispatch implementations
- Tests: concurrent flat-slot read correctness (8 threads), page-cache
  latency microbenchmark under load, concurrent stress mutation with
  per-lane counters, dirty-bitmap commit/rollback/10k-scale/crash-recovery

B-tree cursor:
- Add PageReader::prefetch_page_hint() and PageWriter zero-copy staging
  methods (try_take, try_mutate, restore) to PageWriter trait
- Delegate through TransactionPageIo to TransactionHandle
- Convert TableAppendHint.page_data to Option<PageData> with
  without_page_data() and retains_page_data() accessors
- Optimize refresh_rightmost_leaf_cache_after_insert to short-circuit
  when cursor is already on the cached leaf, or reposition from cache
  rather than re-traversing from root
- Improve depth hint logic for append workloads
- Minor: &mut W -> &W for quick_balance_divider_rowid, lint suppression

E2E test:
- Add bd_ezg4p_prefetch.rs with SharedPrefetchStore implementing
  PageReader/PageWriter that tracks prefetch hits/misses, benchmarking
  B-tree cursor operations with and without prefetch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

     usable_size: u32,
